title: Humor, Seriously
author: Jennifer Aaker, Naomi Bagdonas
subline: Why business needs funny people. Especially its leaders.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A comic strip: 4 panels across the top, 4 across the bottom. The third bottom panel is the PUNCHLINE in red 3px. -->
  <g transform="translate(126 1020)" fill="none" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="320" height="200"/>
    <rect x="340" y="0" width="320" height="200"/>
    <rect x="680" y="0" width="320" height="200"/>
    <rect x="1020" y="0" width="320" height="200"/>
    <rect x="0" y="220" width="320" height="200"/>
    <rect x="340" y="220" width="320" height="200"/>
    <rect x="680" y="220" width="320" height="200"/>
    <rect x="1020" y="220" width="320" height="200"/>
    <g fill="#4c4c4c" stroke="none">
      <circle cx="100" cy="140" r="12"/><rect x="92" y="155" width="16" height="30"/>
      <circle cx="440" cy="140" r="12"/><rect x="432" y="155" width="16" height="30"/>
      <circle cx="780" cy="140" r="12"/><rect x="772" y="155" width="16" height="30"/>
      <circle cx="1120" cy="140" r="12"/><rect x="1112" y="155" width="16" height="30"/>
      <circle cx="100" cy="360" r="12"/><rect x="92" y="375" width="16" height="30"/>
      <circle cx="440" cy="360" r="12"/><rect x="432" y="375" width="16" height="30"/>
      <circle cx="780" cy="360" r="12"/><rect x="772" y="375" width="16" height="30"/>
      <circle cx="1120" cy="360" r="12"/><rect x="1112" y="375" width="16" height="30"/>
    </g>
    <rect x="680" y="220" width="320" height="200" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="3" fill="none"/>
    <g stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none" opacity="0.9">
      <line x1="700" y1="240" x2="980" y2="400"/>
      <line x1="980" y1="240" x2="700" y2="400"/>
      <line x1="840" y1="220" x2="840" y2="420"/>
      <line x1="660" y1="320" x2="1020" y2="320"/>
    </g>
    <circle cx="840" cy="320" r="22" fill="#fc1c46"/>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: A literal comic strip: 8 panels in two rows, the third panel of the bottom row is the punchline — drawn in red 3px outline with a starburst and a red dot at its center. The other seven panels are graphite hairlines with a stick-figure character. The thesis is in the design: humor is a structure, not a vibe. Brand 'HA · HA' in the corner; pill 'LOL' anchors the bottom.
